# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service1
        image: your-repo/service1:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL
      - name: service2
        image: your-repo/service2:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL
      - name: service3
        image: your-repo/service3:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8082
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
    name: service1
  - port: 81
    targetPort: 8081
    name: service2
  - port: 82
    targetPort: 8082
    name: service3
  selector:
    app: microservices

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-ingress
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
spec:
  rules:
  - host: your-domain.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /service1
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-service
            port:
              name: service1
      - path: /service2
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-service
            port:
              name: service2
      - path: /service3
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-service
            port:
              name: service3
